steps: Patient samples will be obtained from distal pancreatectomy, splenectomy, and cholecystectomy. No other procedures or follow-up is needed for research purposes.
Age below 30 or above 50. English Speaking. Able to provide consent. Resected pancreas tissue. Clear and normal structured islets of Langerhans, acinus, and ducts fromH&E.
Large region of squamous metaplasia or PanIN. Abnormal or missing hematoxylin nucleus stain. Strong personal history of diabetes or pancreatitis. Large area percentage of stromal cells.
creator: Kyu Sang Han
